reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente, la.ultima vez que pasamos no tenían nafta, pero, es un buen lugar para descansar un rato del viaje

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the last time we passed by they were out of gas, but it's a good place to rest for a while after the trip.

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsdGVid3BnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar hermoso, gran parque, arboleda con mesas y bancos de cementos para comer o descansar al aire libre o estirar las piernas. Muy cuidado y súper limpio. Los baños siempre con papel, jabón. La higiene es un 10 excelente.
Los empleados tanto de la estación de servicio como los del salón full atentos y educados.
Si pasan por ahí no dejen de descansar un ratito con todas las comodidades que el lugar brinda.

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place, a large park, a grove of trees with cement tables and benches for eating, relaxing outdoors, or stretching your legs. Very well-maintained and super clean. The restrooms are always stocked with toilet paper and soap. The hygiene is excellent.
The staff, both at the gas station and in the restaurant, are very attentive and polite.
If you're passing by, be sure to take a break and enjoy all the amenities the place offers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNscGN1MWNBEAE
